'''mosafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrewise|fibrewise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrewise|fibrewise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mosafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosafithi|mosafithi]] || [[word:mosafiji|mosafiji]] || [[word:mosafishi|mosafishi]] || [[word:mosafiki|mosafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosafuthuthu|mosafuthuthu]] || [[word:mosafujuju|mosafujuju]] || [[word:mosafushushu|mosafushushu]] || [[word:mosafukuku|mosafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosafuthu|mosafuthu]] || [[word:mosafuju|mosafuju]] || [[word:mosafushu|mosafushu]] || [[word:mosafuku|mosafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosafufthuf|mosafufthuf]] || [[word:mosafufjuf|mosafufjuf]] || [[word:mosafufshuf|mosafufshuf]] || [[word:mosafufkuf|mosafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosafethe|mosafethe]] || [[word:mosafeje|mosafeje]] || [[word:mosafeshe|mosafeshe]] || [[word:mosafeke|mosafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosafothotho|mosafothotho]] || [[word:mosafojojo|mosafojojo]] || [[word:mosafoshosho|mosafoshosho]] || [[word:mosafokoko|mosafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosafotho|mosafotho]] || [[word:mosafojo|mosafojo]] || [[word:mosafosho|mosafosho]] || [[word:mosafoko|mosafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosafofthof|mosafofthof]] || [[word:mosafofjof|mosafofjof]] || [[word:mosafofshof|mosafofshof]] || [[word:mosafofkof|mosafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfthÃŸf|mosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfjÃŸf|mosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfshÃŸf|mosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfkÃŸf|mosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mosafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mosafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mosafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mosafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfthÃŸf|mosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfjÃŸf|mosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfshÃŸf|mosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfkÃŸf|mosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfthÃŸf|mosafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfjÃŸf|mosafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfshÃŸf|mosafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosafÃŸfkÃŸf|mosafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosafÃḊthÃḊ|mosafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mosafÃḊjÃḊ|mosafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mosafÃḊshÃḊ|mosafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mosafÃḊkÃḊ|mosafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosafathatha|mosafathatha]] || [[word:mosafajaja|mosafajaja]] || [[word:mosafashasha|mosafashasha]] || [[word:mosafakaka|mosafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosafatha|mosafatha]] || [[word:mosafaja|mosafaja]] || [[word:mosafasha|mosafasha]] || [[word:mosafaka|mosafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosafafthaf|mosafafthaf]] || [[word:mosafafjaf|mosafafjaf]] || [[word:mosafafshaf|mosafafshaf]] || [[word:mosafafkaf|mosafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mosafasha|mosafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosafshÃḋsha|mosafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosafrosha|mosafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosafmusha|mosafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosafyasha|mosafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosafnkshÃḋsha|gomosafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosafnkrosha|gomosafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosafnkmusha|gomosafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosafnkyasha|gomosafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mosasafasha|mosasafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosasafshÃḋsha|mosasafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosasafrosha|mosasafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosasafmusha|mosasafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosasafyasha|mosasafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosasafnkshÃḋsha|gomosasafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosasafnkrosha|gomosasafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosasafnkmusha|gomosasafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosasafnkyasha|gomosasafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mesÃḊfasha|mesÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mesÃḊfshÃḋsha|mesÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mesÃḊfrosha|mesÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mesÃḊfmusha|mesÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mesÃḊfyasha|mesÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomesÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gomesÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomesÃḊfnkrosha|gomesÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomesÃḊfnkmusha|gomesÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomesÃḊfnkyasha|gomesÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mosfafasha|mosfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosfafshÃḋsha|mosfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosfafrosha|mosfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosfafmusha|mosfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosfafyasha|mosfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosfafnkshÃḋsha|gomosfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosfafnkrosha|gomosfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosfafnkmusha|gomosfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosfafnkyasha|gomosfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
